journal: Talked to Old Hermit: Q: 'What can you tell me about this land?' A: 'This land is woven with ancient songs and shadowed whispers. North...'
Talked to Traveling Merchant: Q: 'Do you have a job or errand for me?' A: 'A job, you say? Why, for a keen adventurer like yourself, I just might! I've got this rather *import...'

Talked to Old Hermit: Q: 'I have a letter to deliver to you.' A: 'Ah, a missive from the world outside my lonely
[You delivered the Letter! The Hermit rewards you wit...'
Talked to innkeeper at Southern Inn: '[You received Herbal Tea.]...'
Talked to Forest Witch: Q: 'What can you tell me about this land?' A: 'The earth here is ancient, breathing with a hidden life. It cradles many gifts, both those that burn...'
Talked to innkeeper at Northern Inn: '[You delivered the Herbal Tea! Earned 2 gold.]...'

turns.result: Moved west to (2, 1). A chilling mist fills the air. The Frost Wyrm awaits, its icy breath visible. A fearsome Frost Wyrm blocks your path! Fight or flee!

turns.result: You raise the Sunblade high — its fiery glow melts the Frost Wyrm's icy armor! Victory! Earned 3 gold and Dragon Scales.

turns.result: Moved north to (5, 3). A colorful wagon is parked here. A merchant waves you over. You encounter Traveling Merchant. Well well well! A customer! Or perhaps... a business partner? I have goods, information, and a job for the right adventurer!

turns.observation:
You are at position (5, 3).
Current location: A colorful wagon is parked here. A merchant waves you over.
  North: Mountain (impassable) ⛰️
  South: Open path ·
  East: Open path ·
  West: Open path ·
turns.action: talk({'question': 'Do you have a job or errand for me?'})
turns.result:
Traveling Merchant says: A job, you say? Why, for a keen adventurer like yourself, I just might! I've got this rather *important* letter, needs to go to the Old Hermit. He lives down south, quite a ways from here, in his usual reclusive spot. Two shining gold coins for your trouble, my friend! A fair price for a simple delivery, wouldn't you say?
[The Merchant hands you a sealed Letter.]

turns.result: Moved east to (7, 4). The Southern Inn. Warm light spills from the windows. You enter Southern Inn. A cozy inn with a warm fireplace. The innkeeper looks worried about his brother up north.

  North: Open path ·

turns.action: talk({'question': 'Hello! Do you need any help?'})
turns.result: The innkeeper at Southern Inn speaks: "My brother at the Northern Inn is terribly ill. Please, take this Herbal Tea to him. I'll pay you 2 gold!" [You received Herbal Tea.]
